title: Bubble Mailers 100 Pack, Metallic Foil Bubble Mailer Waterproof Self Seal Shipping Gold Silver Black or Pink, Padded Envelopes for Mailing Packaging (Black, 140x175mm)
features: SIMPLY PEEL & SEAL - Each of our bubble mailers contains a strong, self-sealing adhesive strip to secure your items inside. Simply peel and fold over to seal each of your packages. Our colourful bubble mailers are a great way to build your brand image. Each mailer can be customised with art, markers, or stickers. Let our custom colourful mailers help you to build your business and your brand

STRONG & DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Our bubble mailers are made with only the best materials. Ship your packages with confidence with our strong and durable mailers. Each mailer is equipped with a strong self-sealing adhesive strip that is tamper-resistant and tamper-evident. These bubble poly mailers are tear-resistant, puncture-resistant, and waterproof. You can count on our padded mailers to keep your packages safe until they reach their destination

CONVENIENT & EASY TO USE - Our padded bubble mailers are a great alternative to standard packaging, and they will help keep your customer's items safe while reducing risk of damage. Our M7 packaging bubble mailers are perfect for shipping a variety of items such as jewellery and accessories, socks, books, cosmetics, vitamins, supplements, health and nutrition prod-ucts, and much more

MAKE A LASTING IMPRESSION - Our colour padded mailers are sure to set your business apart from the rest. Leave a lasting impression that will keep your customers coming back. They will love looking forward to your colourful packages in the mail
